name: n8n-tighten
description: Tighten loose n8n workflows before they fail in production. Catches silent failures, bad credential hygiene, fragile retry logic, and architecture anti-patterns. Works in tighten mode (review existing workflows for loose ends) and build mode (generate new ones from a description), with reference docs covering error handling, loops, AI/LLM nodes, expressions, webhooks/schedules, and credentials.
